summary: Iteration 15: Conway Credits Funding Mechanism - All tests passed. Backend APIs (balance, pricing, purchase) working correctly. Frontend shows credits panel with $0.00 balance, 6 tier buttons, QR code payment details, and properly disabled provisioning stepper.
critical_code_review_comments: credits.py correctly proxies to Conway API (api.conway.tech) for balance, pricing, purchase
x402 payment protocol correctly parsed - returns HTTP 402 with payment details
QR code generation working (both simple address and EIP-681 format)
Frontend correctly shows $0.00 balance with red color indicating insufficient credits
All 6 tier buttons ($5, $25, $100, $500, $1000, $2500) displayed and clickable
Create Sandbox button correctly disabled when credits < 2500 cents ($25)
All provisioning steps grayed out (opacity: 0.5, cursor: not-allowed) when no sandbox exists
Balance polling (every 5s) activated when payment panel is shown
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified the Conway Credits funding mechanism. Balance endpoint returns credits_cents=0 (as expected). Pricing returns 6 tiers and 5 VM sizes. Purchase returns complete x402 payment details with QR code, pay_to address (0x21DD37E3E4eA6CCC0a5C98A4944702eDE6E7Be10), USDC amount, and 4 instructions. Frontend shows credits panel before provisioning stepper. Create Sandbox requires minimum 2500 credits_cents ($25 for X-Large VM).

GET /api/credits/pricing.returns: 6 tiers ($5-$2500) and 5 VM pricing options (Small to 2X-Large)

POST /api/credits/purchase (amount=25).returns: success=true, payment_required=true, pay_to, amount_usdc=25, qr_code, instructions

backend_apis_tested: GET /api/credits/pricing - 200 OK (6 tiers, 5 VM pricing options)
